Any.description:
`Any` contains an arbitrary serialized message along with a
URL that describes the type of the serialized message

@type.description: A URL/resource name that uniquely identifies the type of the serialized message.

AssetCriterionClassification.description: It represents the classification of an asset. At least security group must be passed to fetch asset(s).

startTime.title:
Start time. Expected: UTC time
(-- api-linter: aladdin::0901::dictionary-message-field=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because Timestamp is the best suit data type for start time --)

endTime.title:
End time. Expected: UTC time
(-- api-linter: aladdin::0901::dictionary-message-field=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because Timestamp is the best suit data type for end time --)

TradeCommentCommentType.description:
- COMMENT_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Unspecified
 - COMMENT_TYPE_GENERAL: General
 - COMMENT_TYPE_SPECIAL: Special
 - COMMENT_TYPE_BANK: Bank
 - COMMENT_TYPE_INTERNAL: Internal
TradeCommentCommentType.title: Comment Type

TradeQuoteQuoteStatus.description:
- QUOTE_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED: Unspecified
 - QUOTE_STATUS_CANCELLED: Cancelled
 - QUOTE_STATUS_CLIENT_PASSED: Client passed
 - QUOTE_STATUS_COVERED: Covered
 - QUOTE_STATUS_DID_NOT_TRADE: DNT
 - QUOTE_STATUS_ERROR: Error Aladdin
 - QUOTE_STATUS_EXPIRED: Expired
 - QUOTE_STATUS_MISSED: Missed
 - QUOTE_STATUS_PASSED: Passed
 - QUOTE_STATUS_TIED: Tied
 - QUOTE_STATUS_TIMED_OUT: Time out
 - QUOTE_STATUS_TRADED: Traded
 - QUOTE_STATUS_REJECTED: Rejected
 - QUOTE_STATUS_TIED_COVER: Tied cover
 - QUOTE_STATUS_DONE_AWAY: Done away
 - QUOTE_STATUS_NOT_RECEIVED: Not Received
 - QUOTE_STATUS_ACTIVE: Active
TradeQuoteQuoteStatus.title:
Trade Quote Status
(-- api-linter: core::0216::synonyms=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because QuoteStatus is most suitable name --)

assetAssetReference.title: Reference to an asset. It is a one of asset_id

cusip.title: 9-character alphanumeric code used to identify North American financial securities (S&P CUSIP)

sedol.title: 7-character alphanumeric code assigned to securities listed on stock exchanges

isin.title: 12-character alphanumeric code that uniquely identifies a fixed income security across global markets

cins.title:
Variant of CUSIP used for international securities outside North America
(-- api-linter: core::0144::message-field-plural=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because CINS is the name of the identifier --)

bloombergTicker.title: Unique identifier used by Bloomberg to represent a security which typically includes the security name and exchange code

brokerBrokerReference.description:
Reference to a broker: this include the broker id, broker ticker and broker shortname.
For read operations, all fields are returned.
For write operations, at least one field is required. If multiple fields are provided, broker_id takes precedence followed by broker_shortname.

brokerShortname.title: broker shortname - display name for the broker across Aladdin apps

portfolioPortfolioReference.description:
Reference to a portfolio. This includes both the portfolio ID and the portfolio ticker. 
For read operations, both fields are returned. 
For write operations, only one of the two is required. 
If both are provided, the portfolio ID takes precedence over the portfolio ticker.

rpcStatus.description:
The `Status` type defines a logical error model that is suitable for
different programming environments, including REST APIs and RPC APIs. It is
used by [gRPC](https://github.com/grpc). Each `Status` message contains
three pieces of data: error code, error message, and error details.

You can find out more about this error model and how to work with it in the
[API Design Guide](https://cloud.google.com/apis/design/errors).

code.description: The status code, which should be an enum value of [google.rpc.Code][google.rpc.Code].

message.description:
A developer-facing error message, which should be in English. Any
user-facing error message should be localized and sent in the
[google.rpc.Status.details][google.rpc.Status.details] field, or localized by the client.

details.description:
A list of messages that carry the error details.  There is a common set of
message types for APIs to use.

strategyStrategyReference.description:
Reference to a strategy. This includes both the strategy ID and strategy name.
For read operations, both fields are returned.
For write operations, at least one field is required. If both are provided, strategy_id takes precedence.

strategyName.description:
The display name of the strategy.
If the strategy has a parent, the name must be prefixed with the parent name, separated by a colon.
Example: "US : BONDS" (where "US" is the parent strategy).

v1LongrunningOperation.description:
LongrunningOperation represents a long-running operation that is the result
of a network API call.

id.description:
The server-assigned id, which is only unique within the same service that
originally returns it. If you use the default HTTP mapping, the
`id` should have the format of `operations/some/unique/id`.

meta.description:
Service-specific metadata associated with the operation.  It typically
contains progress information and common metadata such as create time.
Some services might not provide such metadata.  Any method that returns a
long-running operation should document the metadata type, if any.

done.description:
If the value is `false`, it means the operation is still in progress.
If true, the operation is completed, and either `error` or `response` is
available.

error.description: The error result of the operation in case of failure or cancellation.

response.description:
The normal response of the operation in case of success.  If the original
method returns no data on success, such as `Delete`, the response is
`google.protobuf.Empty`.  If the original method is standard
`Get`/`Create`/`Update`, the response should be the resource.  For other
methods, the response should have the type `XxxResponse`, where `Xxx`
is the original method name.  For example, if the original method name
is `TakeSnapshot()`, the inferred response type is
`TakeSnapshotResponse`.

assetIds.description: A comma-separated list of Aladdin CUSIPs. The default limit is 10 CUSIPs.

classifications.description: A list of asset classification, such as security group, type, etc.

v2AssetSummary.title: Asset summary describe the security information

issueCountryCode.title: Asset Trading market an ISO code to identify markets, minimum length = 2, maximum length = 6

v2BatchCancelTradesMetaData.description: Meta data related to a BatchCancelTradesResponse.

v2BatchCancelTradesRequest.title:
BatchCancelTradesRequest represents the request to cancel multiple trades in batch.
(-- api-linter: aladdin::9050::request-ids-field=disabled
    aip.dev/not-precedent: No need for ids field. --)
(-- api-linter: aladdin::9050::request-unknown-fields=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because following request fields best suits for batch cancel api --)

tradeKeys.description:
List of trades to be cancelled. At least one trade must be specified.
Users are advised to use small batch sizes and increase parallelism for performance.

v2BatchCancelTradesResponse.title:
BatchCancelTradesResponse represents the response for the BatchCancelTrades.
(-- api-linter: aladdin::9050::response-results-field=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because api result contains only trade summary not the complete trade --)

results.description: Contains the results of the batch cancel trades operation.

v2BatchPostTradesMetaData.description: Meta data related to a BatchPostTradesResponse.

v2BatchPostTradesRequest.title:
BatchPostTradesRequest represents the request to post multiple trades in batch.
(-- api-linter: aladdin::9050::request-ids-field=disabled
    aip.dev/not-precedent: No need for ids field. --)
(-- api-linter: aladdin::9050::request-unknown-fields=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because following request fields best suits for batch post api --)

blockTrades.description:
List of trades to be posted. At least one trade must be specified.
Users are advised to use small batch sizes and increase parallelism for performance.

v2BatchPostTradesResponse.title:
BatchPostTradesResponse represents the response for the BatchPostTrades.
(-- api-linter: aladdin::9050::response-results-field=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because api result contains only trade summary not the complete trade --)

results.description: Contains the results of the batch post trades operation.

trades.title:
The trades contained in this BlockTrade
(-- api-linter: aladdin::0901::dictionary-message-field=disabled
    aip.dev/not-precedent: There is a conflicting trades field in analytics/portfolio_analytics/optimization/v2/optimization_data_model.proto which should rather be positions. --)

duration.title:
Trade duration
(-- api-linter: core::0142::time-field-type=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because we are not using this field in time perspective --)

factor.title:
Trade factor
(-- api-linter: aladdin::0901::dictionary-message-field=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because this is specific to trade factor --)

tradeDate.title:
Trade date
(-- api-linter: aladdin::0901::dictionary-message-field=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because Date is most suitable data type here --)

assetReference.description: Reference to the asset associated with the BlockTrade.

confirmedWith.title:
Trade confirmed with - external party which confirms the trade
(-- api-linter: core::0140::prepositions=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because we want to avoid confusion with confirmed by field --)

confirmedBy.title:
Trade confirmed by initials
(-- api-linter: core::0140::prepositions=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because we want to avoid confusion with confirmed with fields--)
(-- api-linter: core::0124::valid-reference=disabled
    aip.dev/not-precedent: This field is a user id. --)

convexity.title: Convexity of the security at the time of trade

enteredBy.title:
Initials for trade enterer
(-- api-linter: core::0140::prepositions=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because we want consistency with other fields like confirmed_by --)
(-- api-linter: core::0124::valid-reference=disabled
    aip.dev/not-precedent: This field is a user id. --)

multiFundId.title: Multi fund id used to map BlockTrades in Aladdin. (Output only field)

placementId.title: Placement id for the trade. (Output only field)

prepayType.title: Prepayment type. (Output only field) Please refer to Aladdin decode 'PREPAY_MAPPING' to get the list of valid values

price.title:
Price

psa.title: Prepayment rate used by trader. (Output only field)

Transaction type

Trade yield to call. (Output only field)

TBA Stipulations

Swap Points. (Input only field)

Price Type. (Input only field)

reinvestmentRate.title:
Reinvestment Rate

daysToMaturity2a7.title:

forwardPoints.title:
Forward Points. (Input only field)

asset.title: Security associated with the BlockTrade - Can be expanded to summary or reference. (Output only field)

suppressExternalNotification.description: Indicates whether external notifications should be suppressed.

v2BlockTradeSnippet.description: BlockTradeSnippet represents a summary of a BlockTrade.

trades.title: The TradeSnippets contained in this BlockTradeSnippet

brokerReferences.description: A list of broker references for filtering trades.

executingBrokerReferences.description: A list of executing broker references for filtering trades.

v2CancelTradeConfig.title: CancelTradeConfig represents options used to cancel trades

suppressExternalNotification.description: Indicates whether external notifications should be suppressed.

cancelEntireBlock.description: Indicates whether the entire block of trades should be cancelled.

v2CancelTradeRequest.description: CancelTradeRequest represents the request to cancel a trade.

tradeKey.description: Specifies the key of the trade to be cancelled.

v2CancelTradeResponse.description: CancelTradeResponse represents the response for the CancelTrade.

result.description: Contains the result of the cancel trade operation.

quantity.title:
Quote quantity
(-- api-linter: aladdin::0901::dictionary-message-field=disabled
    aip.dev/not-precedent: Type is specific to trade contract. --)

invnum.title:
Trade invnum
(-- api-linter: core::0122::resource-reference-type=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because unique identifier for Trade is a signed int --)

v2DateTimeCriterion.description: It represents date and time-specific criteria. At least one field must be set in this criterion.

tradeDate.title:
It specifies date of trade. Expected format: YYYY-MM-DD
(-- api-linter: aladdin::0901::dictionary-message-field=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because Date is the best suit data type for trade date --)

settlementDate.title: It specifies settlement date of trade. Expected format: YYYY-MM-DD

modifyTimeRange.description: It represents a time range with start and end time of trade modification.

v2ExecutionTimeSource.description:
- EXECUTION_TIME_SOURCE_UNSPECIFIED: No value specified
 - EXECUTION_TIME_SOURCE_VENUE: Time sent from the trading venue
 - EXECUTION_TIME_SOURCE_AUTHORIZED_TIME: Picked up from trade authorized time
 - EXECUTION_TIME_SOURCE_ENTRY_TIME: Picked up from trade entry time
 - EXECUTION_TIME_SOURCE_MANUAL: Time manually entered by user
v2ExecutionTimeSource.title: The source of the trade execution time value

v2FilterQuery.description: It represents filter query that captures various criteria and options for filtering trades.

criteria.title:
It contains criteria to filter trade.
(-- api-linter: aladdin::0901::dictionary-message-field=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because this is specific to trade FilterQuery --)
(-- api-linter: core::0144::message-field-plural=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because the field contains multiple criteria but in form of multiple attributes in a single message --)

options.title:
Options for loading additional trade data, such as relationships, collaterals, external trades etc.
"FILTER_QUERY_OPTION_UNSPECIFIED" - Unspecified option (Default)
"FILTER_QUERY_OPTION_LOAD_TRADE_RELATIONSHIP" - Option to load trade relationships
"FILTER_QUERY_OPTION_LOAD_EXTERNAL_TRADE_REFERENCE" - Option to load external trade references
"FILTER_QUERY_OPTION_LOAD_TRADE_COLLATERAL" - Option to load trade collaterals
"FILTER_QUERY_OPTION_LOAD_TRADE_FX_LEGS" - Option to load trade fx legs
(-- api-linter: aladdin::9016::query-message-criterion=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because this field doesn't represents a criterion --)
(-- api-linter: aladdin::0901::dictionary-message-field=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because this is specific to trade FilterQuery --)

v2FilterQueryCriteria.description: It represent the filter query criteria.

portfolio.title:
It specifies the criteria based on portfolios to filter trade.
Use either portfolio group ticker to filter by a portfolio groups and it's all children portfolios
or portfolio references to filter by specific portfolio identifiers, but not both.
(-- api-linter: aladdin::0901::dictionary-message-field=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because this is specific to trade FilterQueryCriterion --)

dateTime.title:
It specifies filtering based on date and time.
At least one field from date time criterion is required.
(-- api-linter: core::0142::time-field-type=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because we are not using this field in time perspective --)

trade.description: It allows filtering based on trade-specific characteristics. It is an optional field.

asset.title:
It allows filtering based on asset-specific details. It is an optional field.
(-- api-linter: aladdin::0901::dictionary-message-field=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because asset represents one of filter criterion inside filter query criterion here --)

broker.title:
It allows filtering based on broker information associated with the trades. It is an optional field.
(-- api-linter: aladdin::0901::dictionary-message-field=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because broker represents one of filter criterion inside filter query criterion here --)

v2FilterQueryOption.description:
- FILTER_QUERY_OPTION_UNSPECIFIED: Unspecified Option.
 - FILTER_QUERY_OPTION_LOAD_TRADE_RELATIONSHIP: Option to load trade relationships.
 - FILTER_QUERY_OPTION_LOAD_EXTERNAL_TRADE_REFERENCE: Option to load external references.
 - FILTER_QUERY_OPTION_LOAD_TRADE_COLLATERAL: Option to load trade collateral.
 - FILTER_QUERY_OPTION_LOAD_TRADE_FX_LEGS: Option to load trade fx legs.
v2FilterQueryOption.title: Enumeration for various filtering options

v2FilterTradesRequest.description: It represents a request to filter trades.

pageSize.description: The maximum number of trades to return. The service may return fewer than this value. If unspecified or 0, the default value will be applied.

pageToken.description:
A page token, received from a previous 'filterTrades' call. Provide this to retrieve the subsequent page.
When paginating, all other parameters provided to 'filterTrades' must match the call that provided the page token.

query.description: It contains the criterion, options to filter trade.

expands.description:
Specifies which related reference data should be included in the response.
Currently, only asset-related information can be expanded. By default, the response includes just the asset ID.
To get more detailed asset information, use "asset.summary" to include a summary with additional asset details.
For full usage guidance, refer to the Trade API release notes.

v2FilterTradesResponse.title:
It represents the response of the filterTrade API.
(-- api-linter: aladdin::9016::response-message=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because the response contains list of block trades, not trades --)

blockTrades.description: A list of trades that match the filtering criteria.

nextPageToken.description: A token to retrieve the next page of results in subsequent request.

status.description: It contains information about the processed result so far in pagination.

v2MBSCCType.description:
- MBSCC_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Unspecified value
 - MBSCC_TYPE_TRADE_FOR_TRADE: Trade for Trade
 - MBSCC_TYPE_SETTLEMENT_BALANCE_ORDER: Settlement Balance Order
v2MBSCCType.title: Mortgage-Backed Securities Clearing Corporation type

v2PortfolioCriterion.description: It represents portfolio-specific criteria. Only one field should be set in this criterion.

portfolioGroupTicker.description: A ticker that represents a group of portfolios.

portfolioReferences.description: A list of portfolio ids or other unique identifiers.

v2PostTradeConfig.description: PostTradeConfig represents options used to post trades.

mode.description: Specifies the mode for posting trade.

overrideRelationships.title:
Indicates whether relationships should be overridden.
(-- api-linter: core::0144::message-field-plural=disabled
    aip.dev/not-precedent: This is a single value. --)

overrideCharges.title:
Indicates whether charges should be overridden.
(-- api-linter: core::0144::message-field-plural=disabled
    aip.dev/not-precedent: This is a single value. --)

updateEntireBlock.description: Indicates whether the entire block of trades should be updated.

accountCode.description: Specifies the account code of the external account.

entityType.description: Specifies the entity type of the external account.

v2PostTradeRequest.description: PostTradeRequest represents the request to post a trade.

blockTrade.description: Specifies the trade to be posted.

v2PostTradeResponse.description: PostTradeResponse represents the response for the PostTrade.

result.description: Contains the result of the post trade operation.

v2PostingMode.description:
PostingMode defines the action to take when posting trades.

 - POSTING_MODE_UNSPECIFIED: The posting mode is unspecified.
 - POSTING_MODE_NEW: The posting mode for creating new trades.
 - POSTING_MODE_UPDATE: The posting mode for updating existing trades.

v2PriceType.description:
- PRICE_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: No value specified
 - PRICE_TYPE_DIRTY: Price Type - Dirty
 - PRICE_TYPE_YIELD: Price Type - Yield
 - PRICE_TYPE_CLEAN: Price Type - Clean
 - PRICE_TYPE_AMORTIZED: Price Type - Amortized
 - PRICE_TYPE_AMORTIZED_DIRTY: Price Type - Amortized and Dirty
 - PRICE_TYPE_DISCOUNTED: Price Type - Discounted
v2PriceType.title: Price Type for the trade price

v2RetrieveQuery.description: It represents query of retrieve trade request, that contains criterion and options to query trades.

criteria.title:
Criteria to retrieve trade.
(-- api-linter: aladdin::0901::dictionary-message-field=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because this is specific to trade RetrieveQuery --)
(-- api-linter: core::0144::message-field-plural=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because the field contains multiple criteria but in form of multiple attributes in a single message --)

options.title:
Options for loading additional trade data such as complete block trade.
"RETRIEVE_QUERY_OPTION_UNSPECIFIED" - Unspecified option (Default)
"RETRIEVE_QUERY_OPTION_LOAD_COMPLETE_BLOCK" - Option to load complete block trade
(-- api-linter: aladdin::9016::query-message-criterion=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because this field doesn't represents a criterion --)
(-- api-linter: aladdin::0901::dictionary-message-field=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because this is specific to trade RetrieveQuery --)

v2RetrieveQueryCriteria.description: It represents retrieve query criterion. Only one criterion should be set in a request.

tradeKeys.description: A list of trade key criteria.

externTradeKeys.description: A list of external trade key criteria.

v2RetrieveQueryOption.description:
Enumeration for various retrieve options.

 - RETRIEVE_QUERY_OPTION_UNSPECIFIED: Unspecified option.
 - RETRIEVE_QUERY_OPTION_LOAD_COMPLETE_BLOCK: Option to load complete block trade.

v2RetrieveTradesRequest.title:
It represents the request of retrieve trade API.
(-- api-linter: core::0158::request-page-size-field=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because pagination is not supported here --)
(-- api-linter: core::0158::request-page-token-field=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because pagination is not supported here --)

query.description: This field contains the criterion, option to retrieve trade.

expands.description:
Specifies which related reference data should be included in the response.
Currently, only asset-related information can be expanded. By default, the response includes just the asset ID.
To get more detailed asset information, use "asset.summary" to include a summary with additional asset details.
For full usage guidance, refer to the Trade API release notes.

v2RetrieveTradesResponse.title:
It represents response of retrieve trade API.
(-- api-linter: aladdin::9016::response-message=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because the response contains list of block trades, not trades --)
(-- api-linter: core::0158::response-next-page-token-field=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because pagination is not supported --)

status.description: It contains information about how many request processed successfully or partially or error out.

id.title: The unique identifier of the trade

invnum.title:
Invnum
(-- api-linter: aladdin::0901::dictionary-message-field=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because we want to get the trade using the invnum --)

quantity.title:
Unsigned quantity also known as orig_face of the trade
(-- api-linter: aladdin::0901::dictionary-message-field=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because DoubleValue is the most suitable here --)

modifyTime.title: Trade modify time in Aladdin timezone. (Output only field)

orderId.title: Order id for the trade - add reference

fee.title:
Trade fees. (Output only field)
(-- api-linter: aladdin::0901::dictionary-message-field=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because DoubleValue is the most suitable here --)

additionalTradeCharge.title: Additional trade charge or commission on trade that doesn't impact net money. (Output only field)

exchangeRate.title:
Exchange rate  
(-- api-linter: aladdin::0901::dictionary-message-field=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because DoubleValue is the most suitable here --)

effectiveTermDate.title: Trade effective term date. (Output only field)

collaterals.title:
Trade Collaterals  
(-- api-linter: aladdin::0901::dictionary-message-field=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because it is trade collateral --)

currentFactoredDownAmount.title: Current (factored down) amount. For a trade, this is the trade quantity * factor. (Output only field)

interestAtMaturity.title:
Interest at maturity for cash trades, Calculated field. By Aladdin® convention, incoming money is negative, and outgoing money is positive. (Output only field)
(-- api-linter: core::0140::prepositions=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because this is the most suitable name for this field --)

tradeFlags.title:
Trade Flags. flag's value are unset or unspecified by default
(-- api-linter: core::0144::message-field-plural=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because trade flags contains multiple flags. --)

forwardExternalTradeReferences.title: Forward External Trade Reference. (Input only field)

forwardSettlementInstructionId1.title: The forward settlement instruction id1. (Input only field)

mortgageBackedSecuritiesClearingCorporat.description: A netting flag to indicate settlement system for MBS securities. The valid values "Settlement Balance Order" or "Trade for Trade".

v2TradeCharge.title:
Trade charge
(-- api-linter: aladdin::0901::prefix-required-field=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because prefix of all field would be trade_charge --)

amount.title:
Charge amount. This field can be positive or negative: positive means you are paying the charge (usual case). Negative means you are earning the charge (rare).
(-- api-linter: aladdin::0901::dictionary-message-field=disabled
    aip.dev/not-precedent: Type is specific to trade charge. --)

calculationType.description: Calculation method. Please refer to the Aladdin decodes TRD_CHARGE_CALC to get the list of valid values.

rateType.description: Type of rate. (Output only field) Please refer to the Aladdin decodes CHARGERATETYPES to get the list of valid values.

quantity.title:
Collateral quantity
(-- api-linter: aladdin::0901::dictionary-message-field=disabled
    aip.dev/not-precedent: Type is specific to trade collateral. --)

principal.title: Principal money on the trade in the settle currency

collateralPercentage.title: Indicates haircut to be applied to collateral

cashPercentage.title: Indicates haircut to be applied to loan amount

v2TradeComment.title:
Trade Comment
(-- api-linter: aladdin::0901::prefix-required-field=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because prefix of all field would be trade_comment --)

commentType.description: Comment type of trade comment. As decode limits the trade comments processed rather than adds them.

transactionTypes.description: A list of transaction types of trade.

deliveryFreePayment.title: This trade settles free of payment; i.e., it does not settle DVP

electronicPoolNotificationEligible.title: EPN (Electronic Pool Notification) eligible. (Output only field)

v2TradeKey.description: TradeKey represents the uniquely identified keys of trade.

portfolioReference.description: Portfolio reference to retrieve the trades. Preference is given to portfolio id.

touchCount.description: Touch count of the trade - if version and touch count are absent, we fetch the latest trade.

version.title:
Version of the trade - if version and touch count are absent, we fetch the latest trade.
(-- api-linter: aladdin::0901::dictionary-message-field=disabled
    aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because version in trade proto is of type int32 everywhere. --)

bidRate.description: The bid in yield form. It can be calculated based on the bid and security details.

bidSpread.description: The bid as a spread. It can be calculated based on the bid and other trade details like pricing index, pricing spread, and settle date.

offerPrice.title: The offer price associated with the quote

offerRate.description: The offer in yield form. It can be calculated based on the offer and security details.

offerSpread.title: The offer as a spread. It can be calculated based on the offer and other trade details like pricing index, pricing spread, and settle date

bidPrice.description: The bid price associated with the quote.

brokerId.title: Broker Id - The unique ID of the broker who provided this quote

quantity.title:
Quote quantity. (Output only field)
(-- api-linter: aladdin::0901::dictionary-message-field=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because this quantity is specific to trade quote --)

status.title:
Quote status. (Output only field)
(-- api-linter: aladdin::9027::dictionary-conflicting-types-existing=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because the status field is specific to Trade Quote Status. --)

brokerQuoteId.title:
Broker quote id. (Output only field)
(-- api-linter: core::0124::required-reference=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because this field has no reference --)

portfolioReference1.title: Portfolio reference of first trade. (Output only field)

invnum1.title: Invnum of first trade. (Output only field)

amount.title:
Amount
(-- api-linter: aladdin::0901::dictionary-message-field=disabled
    aip.dev/not-precedent: Type is specific to trade amount. --)

version1.title: Version of first trade. (Output only field)

version2.title: Version of second trade. (Output only field)

v2TradeResult.title:
TradeResult represents the result of a trade posting, updating or cancelling.
(-- api-linter: aladdin::9050::result-message-fields=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because api result contains only trade summary not the complete trade --)

error.description: The error result of the operation in case of failure or cancellation.

output.description: The normal response of the operation in case of success.

v2TradeSnippet.description: TradeSnippet represents a summary of a Trade.

quantity.title: Unsigned quantity also known as orig_face

fieldLabel.description: Label value for User Defined Field. Please refer to Aladdin decode 'TE_CUSTOM' to get the list of valid values.

fieldValue.description: Value of User Defined Field. Please refer to Aladdin decode 'TE_CUSTOM' to get the list of valid values.

OAuth2AccessCode.description: This API uses OAuth 2.0 with the access code flow.

scopes.offline_access: This keeps you signed in to the app, even when you are not using it.

OAuth2ClientCredentials.description: This API uses OAuth 2.0 with the client credentials flow.
